description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Create Release that triggers on push to any tag. In a windows-latest job, check out the code, set up .NET 5.0.100, restore dependencies, download Dalamud, build the project with a version matching the tag, modify a JSON file with the version, archive the build, upload it as an artifact, create a release, upload the archive to the release, and update a repo.json file with the version before committing and pushing it to the master branch.
